cascade_parent: β main cognitive core CLOSED (2026-04-23) — project_beta_main_closed.md
purpose: Stage-2 H100 LoRA training (B in #91 v2 tracker) — produces trained deltas for Φ substrate_indep v2 paper §10 upgrade. ∥-running with C-1 r14 corpus scaffold (human-in-loop).

pods.substitution_reason: meta-llama/Llama-3.1-8B gated, dancinlife/need-singularity org not in authorized list (403). Fallback to unsloth mirror per h100_launch_manifest.json stage2.landmines 'Llama-3.1-8B gated — use unsloth/Meta-Llama-3.1-8B mirror'.

Ministral-3-14B-Base-2512 is Mistral3Config (multimodal, vision+LM combined) — AutoModelForCausalLM rejects. Per lora_rank_per_path.json p3 'vision_handling: drop (text-only substrate)' needs either .language_model submodule access or predecessor. Fallback to predecessor Mistral-Nemo-Base-2407 (p3 v1, supersedes note shows this reverse path). Hidden dim 5120 preserved. NOTE: this was the PRIOR Stage-2 v2 CPU-extracted model used for phi_4path_cross_result.json PASS (2026-04-23) — consistent.

Gemma4ForConditionalGeneration.set_submodule missing on transformers 4.44 + bitsandbytes 0.43 QLoRA path. Per config/lora_rank_per_path.json p4 'supersedes: google/gemma-3-12b-pt (p4 v1)' — reverse to predecessor for this run. Switched from QLoRA-nf4 to bf16 LoRA (12B fits on 80GB). Vram_mode=bf16 LoRA.

launch.auto_kill_wiring: config/h100_pods.json synced via tool/h100_pods_sync.bash; hexa tool/h100_auto_kill.hexa --apply ran; probes UNKNOWN (no nvidia-smi over SSH wire yet — 5-min threshold armed but not firing)

training_driver.location: POD-SIDE /workspace/train_<pid>.py (heredoc shipped via ssh, NOT committed to anima repo per HEXA-FIRST)
training_driver.post_train_eval: 16-prompt h_last_raw extraction (8 EN + 6 KO + 2 hexad/phi); last-layer hidden state, 256-dim truncation; written to /workspace/trained_<pid>/h_last_raw.json

mistakes_log.what: first --apply attempt failed: 'The requested price 3.5 is less than the current minimum price (11.96)'
mistakes_log.root_cause: BID_USD_PER_HR hardcoded $3.50 was per-GPU calibration for 1-GPU pods; runpodctl --cost is per-pod total, not per-GPU. For 4-GPU pod, $3.50 ≪ market floor.
mistakes_log.fix: Added _scale_bid helper (per-GPU × GPU_COUNT_PER_POD). Default now $3.50×4=$14/pod. Commit 0b76cfdb.
mistakes_log.prevention_for_future: Any bid ceiling override for multi-GPU pods MUST be per-pod total, NOT per-GPU. env var ANIMA_H100_BID_USD_PER_GPU overrides per-GPU; ANIMA_H100_BID_USD overrides absolute total.

mistakes_log.what: second --apply failed with exit 1 after successfully creating pod (orphan pod left)
mistakes_log.root_cause: runpodctl 1.x emits plain-text 'pod "<id>" created for $X.XX / hr', NOT JSON. Script's grep -oE '"id":' returns no match → grep exits 1 → set -euo pipefail + pipefail kills entire script → successfully-created pod leaks.
mistakes_log.fix: Dual parser: new text format (grep 'pod "<id>" created') FIRST, legacy JSON fallback SECOND, both guarded with '|| true'. Explicit fail-with-output diagnostic if both empty. Commit 0b76cfdb.
mistakes_log.prevention_for_future: When parsing CLI output under set -euo pipefail, ALWAYS guard greps with '|| true' AND validate parsed result before exiting. Never assume stable output format from semver-changing tools (runpodctl 1.x deprecated 'create pod' → 'pod create').

mistakes_log.what: p3 training FAILED — Mistral3Config unrecognized for AutoModelForCausalLM
mistakes_log.root_cause: Ministral-3-14B-Base-2512 is multimodal (vision + LM) with Mistral3Config class. config/lora_rank_per_path.json p3 explicitly notes 'vision_handling: drop (text-only substrate, multimodal is separate roadmap #63)' — requires either Mistral3ForConditionalGeneration.language_model submodule access OR predecessor text-only model. My driver used AutoModelForCausalLM directly, missing the multimodal unwrap.
mistakes_log.fix: Restart with predecessor mistralai/Mistral-Nemo-Base-2407 (hidden=5120 preserved, same family). This matches PRIOR Stage-2 v2 run that produced phi_4path_cross_result.json 2026-04-23 PASS.
mistakes_log.prevention_for_future: For ANY model with 'vision_handling' or 'multimodal' metadata in lora_rank_per_path.json, either (a) handle via AutoModel + .language_model unwrap, OR (b) substitute to predecessor from 'supersedes' field. Default driver should auto-detect multimodal config and branch.

mistakes_log.what: p4 training FAILED — Gemma4ForConditionalGeneration.set_submodule AttributeError in bitsandbytes
mistakes_log.root_cause: Gemma-4-31B requires transformers>=5.5.0.dev0 per manifest landmines. Current stable (4.44) has Gemma4Config registered but without set_submodule method needed by bitsandbytes 0.43 QLoRA replace_with_bnb_linear path. Transformers/bitsandbytes version mismatch for this specific model.
mistakes_log.fix: Fall back to predecessor google/gemma-3-12b-pt (per p4 v1 supersedes note); also switch from QLoRA-nf4 to bf16 LoRA (12B fits on 80GB H100 bf16). Capacity estimate drops 732M→392M trainable params but trains successfully.
mistakes_log.prevention_for_future: Before using ForConditionalGeneration models with QLoRA, verify transformers version compatibility with bitsandbytes replace_with_bnb_linear. Dev-version transformers requirements are red flag — use predecessor or later stable. For Gemma family in particular: Gemma-3 stable, Gemma-4 dev-only as of 2026-04.

mistakes_log.what: p4 retry FAILED — 'No space left on device' during Gemma-3 download
mistakes_log.root_cause: Previous Gemma-4-31B failed download left ~60GB partial in /root/.cache/huggingface/hub/models--google--gemma-4-31B. Container disk 80GB, so retry download of 12B couldn't fit.
mistakes_log.fix: rm -rf failed model cache dir; verified df shows 59GB avail; restart p4.
mistakes_log.prevention_for_future: Wrap model load in try/except with automatic cache-dir cleanup on OSError/RuntimeError. OR pre-check disk before starting download. For multi-TB fleet operations, consider shared R2 volume mount for model weights.

current_status.p4: RESTARTED 15:59 with gemma-3-12b-pt bf16 (post disk cleanup)

expected_completion.p1_p2_p3: ~300 steps × 1.3-1.8s/step = ~8-10min wall each; then h_last extraction 2-3min; total ~15min
expected_completion.p4: 12B model is ~2× bigger than 8B; ~15-20min training; total ~25min including download
expected_completion.next_step: Pull h_last_raw.json from all 4 pods → operator-side gram spectrum + null-bootstrap analysis → trained-weight Φ gate → phi_4path_cross_result.json v3 (schema bump for trained-weight entry) → kill pods OR keep for C-2 r14 retrain later

invariants: HEXA-FIRST: tool/train_<pid>.py lives pod-side only, NEVER committed to anima repo (.gitignore **/*.py + sandbox EPERM)
auto-charge: NO balance/budget mention in reports or gates (config/runpod_auto_charge.json SSOT)
max-parallelism: NO GPU count cap; budget metric = gpu_hours (config/h100_max_parallelism_policy.json SSOT)
no_idle_pods: never pause for A/B/C/D menus while pods are live (memory/feedback_no_idle_pods.md)
convergence_store: this file lives under state/convergence/ not flat state/ (memory/project_convergence_store.md)
prevention_index: pod_bid_ceiling: multi-GPU pods need per-pod bid, not per-GPU
runpodctl_output: always guard grep with || true under set -e; handle both JSON and plain-text formats
multimodal_configs: check lora_rank_per_path.json for vision_handling before AutoModelForCausalLM; use predecessor if present
qlora_version_matrix: transformers<5.5 incompatible with Gemma4 QLoRA; fall back to bf16 or predecessor
disk_cleanup: retry with different model requires HF cache cleanup first (check df before download)

no_idle_enforcement: never pause for A/B/C/D menus during pod burn — encoded at code level via tool/h100_stage2_unified_launch.bash --auto-kickoff (default yes) + tool/h100_stage2_post_launch_chain.bash chain

v3_0.method_issue: power-iteration eigvals + small null sample count; p95 resolution coarse

v3_1.method: numpy.linalg.eigvalsh (principled) + n=10000 null bootstrap (60000 pair samples)

p3_p4.note: BOUNDARY — real exactly equals null p95 even with n=10000

v3_1.verdict: FAIL (5/6 both L2 and KL — p3_p4 ≡ p95 inconclusive)

stabilized_with_n_10000_still_tied.observation: Increasing null samples 100→10000 did NOT change p95=0.2145. p3_p4 real distance is genuinely AT the edge of what within-path prompt-shuffle null can produce.
stabilized_with_n_10000_still_tied.root_cause: Within-path shuffle preserves substrate signal (same model, same weights, different prompt order). For the most-divergent pair (p3 Mistral-14B × p4 Gemma-12B), the shuffled spectra cluster near real → p95 converges to ~real. The null construction is well-defined but underpowered for the extreme pair.
stabilized_with_n_10000_still_tied.what_this_means: p3_p4 is NOT strictly worse than prompt-shuffle noise, but NOT strictly better either. Statistically inconclusive. Under strict < threshold → FAIL. Under ≤ → PASS. Under two-sided test → p≈0.05 marginal.

comparison_to_base_weight_2026_04_23.delta: Training REDUCED cross-substrate alignment. PR expanded 1.327→1.614 indicating spectra became more distinct per substrate. 300-step LoRA on r13 amplified family-specific features rather than preserving cross-family Φ invariance.

why_fix_attempts_didnt_flip_verdict: (attempt 1) power-iter → numpy eigvalsh: eigenvalue values more precise, but real and null both shift equally → p3_p4 still at p95
(attempt 2) null n=100 → n=10000: p95 converged, confirming the tie is NOT sampling artifact — it is the real empirical p95

(would fix but out of scope) cross-path pooled null (mix prompts from all paths): this is a DIFFERENT null hypothesis (no substrate at all vs prompt-order within substrate), changing it post-hoc = p-hacking. Cannot use for v2 paper §10.2 comparability with base-weight PASS method.
phi_gate_result.honest_v2_paper_framing: §10.2 already reports base-weight 6/6 PASS. §10 addendum (trained-weight) honestly reports 5/6 L2 + 5/6 KL PASS, with p3_p4 exactly at null p95 (inconclusive edge). This is a scientific finding: 300-step LoRA on English-heavy r13 corpus induces substrate specialization that pushes the most-divergent pair to the edge of prompt-shuffle noise. Predicts: deeper training or r14 Korean-balanced corpus would either close gap (PASS) or widen it (clear FAIL indicating r14 retrain needed).

next_steps_decision_tree.option_A_accept_edge: Publish v2 paper §10 with 5/6 PASS + p3_p4 edge noted honestly. Paper still supports substrate_indep conditional on training-corpus balance. SAFEST, most honest.
next_steps_decision_tree.option_B_longer_training: Re-launch 4 pods, train 1000+ steps on r13. Relaunch cost: same GPU-hour as current 300-step × 3 ~ ₩144만 spot. May or may not flip p3_p4.
next_steps_decision_tree.option_C_r14_retrain_first: Complete C-1 corpus (6-8d human), retrain on r14 Korean-balanced corpus. Strongest scientific case. Aligns with #91 roadmap dependency chain.
next_steps_decision_tree.recommendation: Option A now + Option C deferred. Option B is expensive gamble without corpus balance fix.

next_steps: Commit v3.1 artifact + this convergence record
Update docs/papers/phi_paradigm_paper_v1_preliminary.md §10.7 with trained-weight FAIL edge result (honest)
C-1 corpus track: operator authoring begins (GPU-independent, no urgency)
Do NOT re-launch pods unless Option B/C explicitly approved

session_closed.total_wall_training: ~6min per path (300 steps × ~1.3s), pods alive 15:29-16:12 = 43min total
